const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3001/api';async function request(path){let options=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const res=await fetch(`${API_URL}${path}`,{headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},...options});if(!res.ok){const err=await res.json().catch(()=>({error:res.statusText}));throw new Error(err.error||res.statusText);}return res.json();}// Titles
export const getTitles=(genre,limit,pageState)=>{const params=new URLSearchParams();if(genre)params.set('genre',genre);if(limit)params.set('limit',String(limit));if(pageState)params.set('page_state',pageState);return request(`/titles?${params}`);};export const getTitle=id=>request(`/titles/${id}`);export const createTitle=data=>request('/titles',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(data)});// Users
export const registerUser=(username,email)=>request('/users/register',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({username,email})});export const getUser=id=>request(`/users/${id}`);export const getUserHistory=(id,limit,pageState)=>{const params=new URLSearchParams();if(limit)params.set('limit',String(limit));if(pageState)params.set('page_state',pageState);return request(`/users/${id}/history?${params}`);};export const getUserProgress=(userId,titleId)=>request(`/users/${userId}/progress/${titleId}`);export const getRecommendations=userId=>request(`/users/${userId}/recommendations`);// Watch
export const recordWatch=data=>request('/watch',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(data)});// Ratings
export const submitRating=data=>request('/ratings',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(data)});export const getTitleRating=titleId=>request(`/titles/${titleId}/rating`);export const getUserRating=(userId,titleId)=>request(`/ratings/user/${userId}/${titleId}`);// Reviews
export const submitReview=data=>request('/reviews',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(data)});export const getTitleReviews=(titleId,limit,pageState)=>{const params=new URLSearchParams();if(limit)params.set('limit',String(limit));if(pageState)params.set('page_state',pageState);return request(`/reviews/${titleId}?${params}`);};// Watchlist
export const getWatchlist=userId=>request(`/users/${userId}/watchlist`);export const addToWatchlist=(userId,data)=>request(`/users/${userId}/watchlist`,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(data)});export const removeFromWatchlist=(userId,titleId)=>request(`/users/${userId}/watchlist/${titleId}`,{method:'DELETE'});// Analytics
export const getTrending=(genre,months)=>{const params=new URLSearchParams({genre});if(months)params.set('months',String(months));return request(`/analytics/trending?${params}`);};
